# harvester_blockdevice (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_blockdevice" "nvme" {
  name      = "blockdevice-pci-0000-04-00-0-abcdef123456"
  namespace = "longhorn-system"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `dev_path` (String) the device path of the disk, e.g. /dev/sda
- `device_status` (List of Object) device hardware and filesystem status (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_status))
- `device_tags` (List of String) device tags for provisioner, e.g. ["default", "small", "ssd"]
- `disk_provisioner` (List of Object) provisioner configuration for the block device (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--disk_provisioner))
- `force_formatted` (Boolean) force format the device to overwrite existing filesystem
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `node_name` (String) name of the node to which the block device is attached
- `provision` (Boolean) whether the device should be provisioned for storage
- `provision_phase` (String) provisioning phase: Provisioned, Unprovisioned, or Unprovisioning
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--device_status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `device_status`

Read-Only:

- `bus_path` (String)
- `capacity_size_bytes` (Number)
- `dev_path` (String)
- `device_type` (String)
- `drive_type` (String)
- `filesystem_type` (String)
- `is_read_only` (Boolean)
- `is_removable` (Boolean)
- `model` (String)
- `mount_point` (String)
- `parent_device` (String)
- `partitioned` (Boolean)
- `serial_number` (String)
- `storage_controller` (String)
- `vendor` (String)
- `wwn` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--disk_provisioner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner`

Read-Only:

- `longhorn` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--disk_provisioner--longhorn))
- `lvm` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--disk_provisioner--lvm))

<a id="nestedobjatt--disk_provisioner--longhorn"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner.longhorn`

Read-Only:

- `disk_driver` (String)
- `engine_version` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--disk_provisioner--lvm"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disk_provisioner.lvm`

Read-Only:

- `parameters` (List of String)
- `vg_name` (String)
